1.0.7.en: Fixed crash in Account device caused by single digit day number for account rollover

1.0.9.en: Researched fix to enum key problem on month_day.period_start on account device

1.0.10.en: Fix to crash caused by timeout obtaining data from Octopus Home Mini

1.0.11.en: First attempted fix for Bug #2 missing tariff causes energyAccount to crash

1.0.12.en: Attempt fix to Bug #4 - failure to set tomorrow's prices capability to true

1.0.14.en: Refresh account data every 30 minutes; energyAccount simplify calculation of period stand charge; improve commenting and remove redundant code

1.0.16.en: Dynamic capability sets on devices with modifiable capability options

1.0.17.en: First simple integration of dispatches for intelligent tariffs

1.0.18.en: Fix to Bug #7 devices not being updated

1.0.19.en: Attempted fix of Bug #7 and its follow-on

1.0.21.en: Rollback to 1.0.16 code base. Make changes to support single slot tariffs such as Octopus Tracker. Re-add the device count capability to verify ability to access Device and Dispatch data for Intelligent Tariffs.

1.0.23.en: Harden code to access live meter reading data; filter devices to those that have Smart Control In Progress; remove excess logging

1.0.24.en: Dispatch count capability on productTariff device to demonstrate correct access to flexPlannedDispatch data; tidy up logging.

1.0.25.en: Point release to broaden the selection of Intelligent Devices based on Device Status Codes

1.0.26.en: Point fix to resolve retrieval of Dispatch Slots

1.0.27.en: Point release to suppress Device and Dispatch capabilities for non-intelligent tariffs. Force through updates to capability titles.

1.0.28.en: Implement queued capability update architecture and fix capability listener not found error

1.0.29.en: Simplify Product Tariff device updates; remove "untaxed" capabilities and add "tax rate" capability; shorten date/time formats on all devices; refactor and tidy code

1.0.30.en: First test release of Smart Energy Devices; dynamic capability improvements; projected bill calculation refinement

1.0.31.en: Augment device status codes used to filter devices on pairing and dispatch data retrieval issue #10

1.0.32.en: Remove test data for smart devices

1.0.33.en: Add WHEN flow cards for when... Dispatch Starts and when... Dispatch Ends

1.0.34.en: Harden code to handle devices created in error when test data was released in error

1.0.35.en: Implement Dispatches in the Energy Account device; fix bug #12 by strengthening code

1.0.36.en: Add new capability to Smart Device counting the number of dispatched minutes per day

1.0.38.en: % Consumed of Dispatch Limit capability (limit fixed at 360 minutes)

1.0.39.en: Fix to issue #14; root cause is not understood so this is not a full resolution.

1.0.40.en: Re-implement the EnergyAccount device with correct Dispatch price tracking; Update the SmartEnergyDevice to track Planned Dispatches rather than Extended Dispatches

1.0.41.en: Correct application of dispatches to distinguish Dispatch to Device from Dispatch Pricing; Improve focus of EnergyAccount and ImportTariff devices; All Dispatch Pricing managed by ImportTariff device; Measure Power capabilities added to EnergyAccount

1.0.42.en: Replace slider UI setting of Period Start Day with device setting; Add device settings for MaxDispatchMinutes and KrakenPollingPeriod (not yet implemented)

1.2.0.en: Significant architectural change to improve cpu performance and significantly reduce memory creep; improvements to valuation of energy consumption; improvements to projected bill calculation; reduced app size.

1.2.1.en: Resolve (i) Failure to start event loop on pairing first devices; (ii) Inability to pair with Smart Devices; (iii) Wrong currency units on Tariff £/kWh capability; (iv) Calculation of Account Standing Charge capability in pence not pounds.  Unresolved: Inability to change settings values for settings like Exclude From Energy.

1.2.2.en: Resolve defect preventing modification of device settings

1.2.3.en: Modify dispatch handling to require the device to be SMART_CONTROL_CAPABLE, SMART_CONTROL_IN_PROGRESS or BOOSTING in order for planned dispatches to be processed; add dispatch type to the SmartEnergyDevice for current and next dispatches; show max price in the Import Tariff when receiving a BOOST dispatch; use formal injection pattern for handling test data; use .homeyIgnore to ensure test data is not published.

1.2.4.en: Further stabilisation of memory use and reduction in CPU; Prevent device pariing if no Octopus Home Mini is found for the Octopus Account.

1.2.5.en: Heavy and light queries to reduce network traffic; caching of heavy query results; implementation of energy settings so that Octopus Account works correctly as the god of the Grid in the Energy Tab.

1.2.6.en: Resolve the problem where smart dispatches were still processed even if device status changed to be UNAVAILABLE between full data refresh (heavy) transactions
